output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here’s Exactly What to Do
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your deposit? Learn your rights and send a demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com.
content_outline: The Silent Treatment: Why Landlords Illegally Withhold Security Deposits
Know Your Rights: State Timelines and What Landlords Can Actually Deduct
DIY Justice: How to Write a Security Deposit Demand Letter That Gets Results
When to Escalate: Filing in Small Claims Court and Penalties You Can Claim
The 60-Second Fix: Get Your Legally Sound Demand Letter Without a Lawyer
key_points: Most states require landlords to return security deposits within 14–30 days and provide an itemized list of any deductions.
Normal wear and tear—like minor carpet wear or faded paint—cannot be legally deducted from your deposit.
A formal letter of demand is the most effective first step to recover your money and creates a paper trail if you go to court.
Deposits-Back.com lets tenants generate a state-specific, legally credible demand letter in 60 seconds for a flat $19.99 with no sign-up or subscription.
output.cta: Stop waiting and start fighting back. Create your security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for just $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no sign-up, no subscription, no stress.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters who have moved out and are facing illegal or delayed security deposit withholding, seeking an affordable, fast, and legally credible way to demand their money back without hiring a lawyer.

Your landlord has 21 days to return your deposit. If they ghost you, this $19.99 letter changes everything. #tenantrights
They can’t keep your money for ‘normal wear and tear.’ Stop letting landlords bully you—send a demand letter in under a minute.
My landlord tried to charge me $500 for cleaning. I sent this letter instead. Got my full deposit back 5 days later. #lifehack
